reviews.review_description: I had 1:06 on Rush Hour but it said 1:41

reviews.review_title: Great Download and heaps of Potential 😄
reviews.review_description:
SEE BOTTOM FOR TUTORIAL>
Got this game and played it for a while. I was pleasantly surprised;
Yes, this game is in the early stages (duh) and the mechanics aren't perfect, BUT:
Once I realized how it works, I caught on quickly and found it rather addictive. There's five levels right now, and my favourite is probably level four. I think the dev is trying to get this game to work, so keep it up!

Pros:
Great concept
Addictive
Leaderboard
Last run tacker
Five levels (hopefully more soon!)
Great challenge, lots of options for routes

Cons:
No tutorial 
Five levels
A bit confusing
Basic graphics, gameplay

TUTORIAL: 
Use fingers to choose level
Once in, joystick to move
X to jump (hold to charge) 
You can climb on red objects
To "climb" a wall just run fast into it
Technically it's wall running
Press right thumb stick to slide/crouch
And press any button to start the level
Good luck!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your detailed review, we're so happy you can see the potential with Freerunner Championship and really appreciate the feedback (this is exactly what we need as we look to improve the game). If you would like to join our Discord and be a part of the community helping to build the game, we would love to have you (https://discord.gg/9KUXQVU4JT). Thanks for the tutorial for other players as well, we'll be introducing an in-game tutorial soon, but this is so helpful!

- Marcus

reviews.review_description: It’s a hard game to master but I always want to give it one more go!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your 5 star review! We agree the game is definitely tricky to master, but we always find ourselves wanting one more go like you said!

- Marcus

reviews.review_description: While the graphics are functional (and this is a demo, so that's not a criticism), the gameplay loop is really addictive and I found myself having lots of 'just one more go' attempts.  Good fun and I eventually smashed my initial times once I had got the hang of it.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review! We're so glad you found Freerunner Championship addictive - we agree it's more'ish and find ourselves wanting 'just one more go'. As you said this is only a 'demo', but we're looking to bring significant updates in the near future, so hopefully we can tempt you to jump back in!

- Marcus

reviews.review_title: My old review got taken down
THIS GAME IS ONE IF THE WORST GAMES EVER
reviews.review_description: When I got in the music was so loud the woman that was talking to me would not shut up. In the middle of the first level it was talking about dating! it said “are you lonely do you have no friends? Are you a loser that looks likes dobby?” SHUT UP. The movement felt like ice. the mechanics were so hard and bad. This game can go not on the meta store

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your honest review, we really appreciate the feedback and will be looking to improve the game in the near future with significant updates. Unfortunately this was accidentally listed as a full release rather than as early-access as we had hoped, but we want to make clear this is very much a work-in-progress and your feedback will be taken onboard going forward.

- Marcus

developer_response.body:
We really appreciate your honest review of Freerunner Champiosnhip in its current form. We will be bringing significant updates to address these issues and thank you for your feedback. This should not have been listed as a 'full' game and instead should have been early access (this is something we're also hoping to address) as it is very much a work-in-progress right now.

- Marcus

reviews.review_description: Do not download this game if you do not too late uninstall it instantly no mechanics work and there’s a big bug where if you are running, you get launched into the ground and you have to restart the whole entire level so yeah just don’t download this game ￼

developer_response.body:
We're really sorry you experienced this bug. We'll be bringing updates to the game in the very near future which will address these types of issues and improve the overall Freerunner Championship experience!

reviews.review_description: It's not good climbing is bad the GRAPHICS mid

developer_response.body: Hi ZORO_LUFFY2154, Thanks for your comment! The Freerunner Championship is a prototype from Maze Theory i-labs that's still in development. We appreciate your feedback and hope you'll check back as we refine the gameplay. Right now, the game is in a block mesh stage, which helps our designers work on mechanics without the need for a fully detailed art style or world. We have some exciting plans for Freerunner, so we hope you'll return to see how it evolves!

We're sorry to hear you couldn't get the mechanics to work. This is just a 'demo' and we know it can be hard to get to grips with. We'll be looking to bring updates in the future and hopefully make it easier to play and understand the mechanics.

- Marcus

Thank you for leaving us a 5 star review!

- Marcus

reviews.review_description: This game has a decent idea and I downloaded it thinking i would get a highly polished parkour game, but I thought wrong. Don’t be tricked by how easy it looks to play. I tried jumping up onto ledges and wall running but I kept falling or not getting up, (and no it is not a skill issue). So, don’t get it.

developer_response.body:
Hi superot, Thanks for your feedback. I’m sorry to hear that the current version didn’t meet your expectations. Please keep in mind that this is an early prototype of Freerunner Championship, and it’s still a work in progress. We’re using this stage to gather community feedback and make improvements.

Your input is incredibly valuable as we work to enhance the game play and mechanics. We’re committed to evolving the game based on feedback like yours and will be releasing updates to address these issues.

Thank you for your patience and for helping us make the game better. We hope you’ll check back soon to see the improvements.
